function.name: submit_call_data
function.description: Submit call outcome and all collected data to the CRM. ALWAYS call this before ending the call — no exceptions.

call_outcome.description: The final outcome of the call

appointment_date.description: Appointment date in YYYY-MM-DD format — required for BOOKED and VIRTUAL_MEETING_REQUESTED

callback_date.description: Callback date in YYYY-MM-DD format — required for CALLBACK_REQUESTED

callback_reason.description: Brief reason for the callback e.g. 'spouse not home', 'busy call back Friday'

spouse_phone.description: Spouse or co-owner's direct phone number if collected

email.description: Prospect's email address — required for VIRTUAL_MEETING_REQUESTED

electric_bill_range.description: Monthly electric bill amount or range e.g. '$200-250' or '$300+'

home_age_year.description: Year the home was built e.g. '1985'

roof_age_years.description: Age of the roof in years as a number

has_solar.description: Whether the home already has solar panels installed

credit_above_650.description: Whether the prospect's credit score is above 650

gate_code.description: Gate or community entry code if applicable

other_utility.description: Utility company name if the prospect is NOT with F P and L
